title: cyperus polystachyos var. cleaveri
intro: Cyperus polystachyos var. cleaveri, also known as Cleaver's Sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family and is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The leaves and roots of Cleaver's Sedge can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
